basic_details.short_information: Indian National Space Promotion and Authorization Centre (IN SPACe) Recruitment 2026 for 10 posts of Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2). Candidates with BE/B.Tech, M.E/M.Tech, LLM Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IN SPACe official website inspace.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree, Engineering Degree (BE/B.Tech.), Master's Degree, LLM

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IN SPACe Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IN SPACe Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
